name: Wastebasket Frosted - Room Essentials™
description: Have your bath space free of clutter with this Frosted Wastebasket from Room Essentials™. Crafted with a smooth and sturdy plastic exterior, this white bathroom wastebasket sports a chic, frosted construction and white trim at the rim for a pop of contrast. Designed with a sleek, tapering silhouette and a wide rim, this round wastebasket fits neatly into compact spaces while corralling trash away neatly. Place in your bathroom with coordinating bath accessories for a tied-together look.
